Event: Ghost Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 27/01/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: S24
Chain Rider Sword

When attacking, has a 20%-22% chance of restoring 9%-11% health in self.
Once in a while, the unit poisons all enemies in a small radius around it for 4 sec. Poisoned enemies take 160000 magic damage for 4 sec. Their attack speed and damage are reduced by 15% per second. Stacks up to 5 times. Each poisoned enemy has a 70% chance to be covered with acid for 4 sec. The units covered with acid take 128000 magic damage for 4 sec. The acid corrodes their armor, reducing it by 15% per second for a total of 3 sec. When the armor reduction reaches 45%, the effect lasts for another 1 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event date: 27/01/2025

Sage bot code: S24

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
